title: Saturn’s Failure Echoes Upward
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Saturn, Unknown person #15, Vegapunk, Bonney as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Good morning, everybody. You'll find that you three..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Have a missing fortnight's worth of memories that were wiped of your own volition."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "A number of things will probably come as a surprise because of this, which is ironically pretty amusing."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "I will tell you one thing though."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The world government has found out about our research into the Void century..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I have already taken the best precautions possible. You will just have to put your faith in me and die."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Am I really telling myself to go! We?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stella, Emperor straw hat's crew and Bonney have just made landfill!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's also a naval armada coming to blockade the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Admiral Kizaru and Elder Saint Saturn seem to be with them!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: After we rescue Bonney from down there,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think it'd be best if I stayed put!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't need to help me escape anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've thought about it; just let me die here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What?! do you have a death wish?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I've come to believe that my death will set something important into motion!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is gonna be a big mess!! We can't just sit there and watch you die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Here's to reuniting with old friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoo!! We're Off to the Land of My Dreams, Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...to be the ones who find it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GEGYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GY

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
